title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called The Hindi Sahitya Sammelan Act, 1962. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 28th June, 1962 vide notification No. S.O. 1954(E), dated 25th June, 1962, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Sec. 3(ii).
